_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Product leadership involves advocating for product management, encouraging a user-focussed, product-led approach and contributing to a self-sustaining product community.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of product management practices as applied to data products, including roadmap prioritization, consumer discovery, feedback loops, and value measurement.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.380), DQ-T-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.368).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.325). Shared vocabulary: [management, product]. DDaT-only terms [advocating, approach, community, contributing, encouraging, focussed] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, consumer, data, discovery, feedback, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.871, R=0.877). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Product leadership involves advocating for product management, encouraging a use" and "Knowledge of product management practices as applied to data products, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.544 > STS 0.325 (gap +0.219). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [management, product] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [management, product]. DDaT-only: [advocating, approach, community, contributing, encouraging, focussed]. WIDAI-only: [applied, consumer, data, discovery, feedback, knowledge].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.219 with low STS 0.325. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
